info.description: REST API for authentication, users, roles, permissions, RBAC, storage-backed profiles, and worker-enabled background tasks.
info.title: Bytecode API

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new token pair.
Creates a user account and returns access and refresh tokens.

get.description: Returns the current health state for the API, database, cache, and storage provider.

put.description: Updates an existing permission by UUID.

get.description: Returns paginated roles with their permissions.

put.description: Updates an existing role by UUID.

post.description: Adds permissions to a role by UUID.

delete.description: Removes permissions from a role by UUID.

get.description: Returns the profile for the authenticated user.
Returns permission names assigned to the authenticated user's role.

put.description: Updates an existing user by UUID.

is_active.description: Use pointer to allow false-value validation

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and a JWT access token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
